name: Sinclair Truck Stop (Wendover)
description: Sinclair-branded truck stop on the Utah side of Wendover at I-80 Exit 4, with diesel fuel lanes, showers, a restaurant, and truck parking.

name: Sinclair - Delle (Delle City Station)
description: Lone fuel and convenience stop in the Bonneville salt-flats stretch, at I-80 Exit 70 in Delle, offering diesel, a convenience store, and restrooms.

name: TA Tooele
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America travel center at I-80 Exit 99 (Lake Point) with Shell diesel, restaurant, showers, truck repair, and a CAT Scale.

name: Love's Travel Stop #436
description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-80 Exit 118 (Redwood Rd) in western Salt Lake City with diesel, showers, laundry, quick-serve restaurants, and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale - TA Tooele
description: Certified CAT Scale located at the TA Tooele travel center at I-80 Exit 99 (Lake Point).

name: CAT Scale - Love's #436 Salt Lake City
description: Certified CAT Scale at the Love's Travel Stop #436 at I-80 Exit 118 (Redwood Rd) in Salt Lake City.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash - Lake Point
description: Blue Beacon truck and trailer wash serving I-80 Exit 99 (Lake Point/Tooele), adjacent to the TA travel center.

name: Wendover Port of Entry
description: Utah UDOT commercial-vehicle port of entry / weigh station operating in both directions on I-80 just inside the Nevada line between Exits 2 and 4.

name: Bonneville Salt Flats Rest Area
description: State rest area on I-80 near mile marker 10 east of Wendover (westbound and eastbound facilities) offering restrooms, parking, and Bonneville Salt Flats viewing.

name: Grassy Mountain Rest Area
description: Remote state rest area on I-80 near mile marker 54-55 (westbound and eastbound) with restrooms, vending, and truck parking in the salt-flats corridor.

name: Mastermind Mobile Repair
description: Mobile truck, trailer, tire, and reefer repair service based at Lake Point (I-80 Exit 99) offering 24/7 roadside assistance.

name: Holiday Hills
description: Independent fuel stop and convenience mart with an adjacent RV park offering satellite fueling, showers, a deli/grill, and short- and long-term truck/RV parking at I-80 Exit 164 in Coalville.

name: Best Western Holiday Hills
description: Best Western motel at the Holiday Hills complex off I-80 Exit 164 with free breakfast, Wi-Fi, and semi-truck parking available on site.

name: Echo Port of Entry
description: UDOT commercial-vehicle port of entry and weigh station on I-80 near the Wyoming line (around MP 180) that all commercial vehicles, buses, and unlicensed vehicles must enter.

name: Echo Canyon Rest Area / Welcome Center
description: State rest area and Utah welcome center in Echo Canyon on I-80 near MP 169-170 (both directions) with restrooms, picnic area, and parking for a break.

name: Moore's Chevron & Towing
description: 24-hour heavy-, medium-, and semi-truck towing, winching, and roadside assistance based in Coalville serving the I-80 corridor through Summit County.

name: Burt Brothers Tire & Service
description: Full-service tire shop on Main Street in Coalville (just off I-80) offering tire sales, flat repair, rotation, and vehicle service.

name: Mark's Gas and Diesel Repair
description: 24/7 mobile truck and diesel repair and tire service covering the Coalville area and the I-80 corridor into Wyoming.
